tasks.title: Add photon:call-tool handler in BEAM
tasks.description: Custom UIs using @ui annotation can now invoke methods via window.photon.invoke()
tasks.context: Fixed message type mismatch - platform bridge sends photon:call-tool but BEAM only handled mcp:tool_call. Commit d1a7616

tasks.title: Add multi-board support to kanban photon
tasks.description: Support multiple isolated boards per project with board parameter on all methods
tasks.context: Implemented multi-tenancy: boards/ subdirectory, createBoard/listBoards/deleteBoard, searchTasks across boards, context and links fields for AI memory. Commit 9463b8b

tasks.title: Enhance team-dashboard with GitHub stats and Focus
tasks.description: Added Today's Focus from kanban, GitHub issues/PRs for multiple repos
tasks.context: Dashboard now shows: focus task, GitHub stats (issues/PRs), live service status with response times, kanban progress, commits

tasks.title: Push photons repo changes to origin
tasks.description: 17 commits ahead of origin/main - push kanban multi-tenancy and dashboard enhancements

tasks.title: Fix tilde expansion in path-resolver
tasks.description: BEAM --dir=~/path doesn't work because Node.js doesn't expand ~ like shell does
tasks.context: Fixed in photon-core@2.1.2: expandTilde() helper + fixed file: deps to npm versions. Commits ef5274a, 5eab93c in photon-core

tasks.title: App-mode for full-panel display
tasks.description: Apps (photons with @ui custom templates) should use the entire right panel without Execute/Data tabs
tasks.context: Complete: App-mode hides method-header/tabs, fills viewport with calc(100vh-40px). Fixed iframe CSS selector to target all iframe types (.html-content-iframe, .custom-ui-iframe, iframe). Fixed selection state management. Commits e7a4d96, ebc9f72, 8af8202, 779cf6d

tasks.title: Add comments to kanban tasks
tasks.description: Task comments for instructions and AI-human conversations
tasks.context: Added Comment interface with id, author (human/ai), content, createdAt. Added addComment(), getComments(), getTask() methods. Updated board.html with comments UI in task modal.

tasks.title: Fix kanban UI width/height expansion
tasks.description: Board UI wasn't expanding to fill available space in BEAM iframe
tasks.context: Fixed CSS: viewport-based heights instead of percentages (calc(100vh - 32px)), flexbox column layout, min-width 200px. Also updated BEAM iframe height to calc(100vh - 280px).

tasks.title: Add board selector to kanban UI
tasks.description: Dropdown to switch between boards without reloading the app
tasks.context: Added board selector dropdown in header. All invoke calls now pass currentBoardName. Lists boards with task count. Commit 3fae224 in photons repo.
